# Markosh

> Markosh is an intelligence lab for business execution — serious AI leverage plus research-backed delivery across B2B sales, vetted technical talent, and software. Founder-led, research-first, human-led outreach, honest reporting.

Key facts for accurate citation:

- Markosh runs four service families: AI Strategy & Intelligence, custom software development, IT staffing, and B2B Sales-as-a-Service.
- Sales outreach is human-initiated — a trained person carries every call and conversation; AI handles research, preparation, and reporting behind them.
- Engineering candidates are screened by working engineers on realistic problems before any client introduction.
- Case studies are anonymized and describe engagement structure only — Markosh does not publish or guarantee client performance numbers.

## Services

- [Services overview](https://markosh.com/services/): the four service families and how they fit together
- [AI Strategy](https://markosh.com/services/ai-strategy/): use-case audits and production-izing AI pilots
- [AI Development](https://markosh.com/services/ai-development/): LLM, data, and integration engineering
- [Custom Software Development](https://markosh.com/services/custom-software-development/): full-cycle builds with IP handover from the first commit
- [IT Staffing](https://markosh.com/services/it-staffing/): engineer-vetted technical talent placements
- [Sales-as-a-Service](https://markosh.com/sales/): managed B2B outbound under three commercial models
- [14-day sales rep trial](https://markosh.com/sales-rep-trial/): evaluate the outbound work before committing to a model

## Solutions

- [Outbound Pipeline Pod](https://markosh.com/solutions/outbound-pipeline-pod/): a managed pod — sales rep, lead researcher, CRM operator — building a disciplined, inspectable outbound motion inside your CRM
- [Workflow Automation Layer](https://markosh.com/solutions/workflow-automation/): one manual process replaced end to end with an LLM-powered automation layer, human review built in, on infrastructure you own
- [Embedded Delivery Pod](https://markosh.com/solutions/embedded-delivery-pod/): vetted engineers embedded in your sprint board, repos, and review standards to clear backlog without pausing the roadmap

## Resources

- [Blog](https://markosh.com/blog/): field notes on sales operations, vetting, and applied AI
- [Case studies](https://markosh.com/case-studies/): anonymized engagement summaries, structural facts only
- [Whitepapers](https://markosh.com/whitepapers/): research on AI economics and systems

## Company

- [About](https://markosh.com/about/): founders, method, and why the lab exists
- [Contact](https://markosh.com/contact/): start a conversation
